operator.description: Official operator of MeetYouLive. Premium social platform to meet people, go live and support content creators through secure payments.

legal.indexDescription: Review the policies governing MeetYouLive, including safety, privacy, payments, creators, intellectual property and moderation. MeetYouLive is operated by MEETYOULIVE TECHNOLOGIES LLC.
legal.registrationNotice: By creating an account you agree to our Terms, Privacy Policy, community rules and payment policies.
legal.onboardingNotice: By continuing you agree to use MeetYouLive under our legal and safety policies.

about.title: About MeetYouLive
about.description: What MeetYouLive is, which digital services it offers, and how coins, memberships and virtual gifts work.

sections.heading: 1. What MeetYouLive is
body: MeetYouLive is a social platform where users can meet people, match, chat, make video calls, join live streams, follow creators and build real-time connections.
The platform combines community, digital entertainment, live streaming, virtual gifts, virtual coins and Premium and VIP memberships.

sections.heading: 2. Digital services
body: MeetYouLive does not sell physical products. All purchases inside the platform are digital services, digital access, memberships, virtual coins or virtual gifts for use inside MeetYouLive.

sections.heading: 3. Coins and in-platform value
body: Virtual coins are used to activate digital experiences, send virtual gifts, support creators or access enabled features. Coins have no monetary value outside MeetYouLive, are not money, are not a deposit and cannot be redeemed outside the platform.

sections.heading: 4. Premium and VIP memberships
body: Premium and VIP memberships provide access to additional digital features, experience benefits, visibility or interaction tools as described at purchase. Availability may vary by country, device or app version.

sections.heading: 5. Creators and community
body: Users may follow creators, join live streams and send virtual gifts. Approved creators must meet identity, safety, content and legal compliance requirements before monetizing or receiving withdrawals.

howItWorks.title: How MeetYouLive works
howItWorks.description: Overview of accounts, profiles, matches, chat, video calls, live streams, coins, gifts and memberships.

sections.heading: 1. Create an account and profile
body: Users create an account, complete a profile and must meet age, safety and authenticity requirements set in our policies.

sections.heading: 2. Discover, match and chat
body: You can discover profiles, match and chat. Some features may require coins, a membership or technical availability.

sections.heading: 3. Video calls and live streams
body: MeetYouLive enables video calls and live experiences when available. Participants must respect consent, privacy, community rules and moderation controls.

sections.heading: 4. Coins, gifts and memberships
body: Coins are purchased as a digital balance for use inside the platform. Virtual gifts are delivered digitally and Premium or VIP memberships enable digital benefits described at checkout.

sections.heading: 5. Payments and support
body: Payments may be processed by Stripe or other authorized providers. If you have an issue with a digital purchase, contact support with your account, date, amount and transaction identifier.

security.title: Security at MeetYouLive
security.description: Tools and controls for reporting, blocking, moderation, content review, fraud prevention and minor protection.

sections.heading: 1. Reporting users
body: You can report profiles, messages, live streams, calls, gifts, payments or content that appears abusive, illegal, fraudulent or against our policies. Reports help prioritize safety review.

sections.heading: 2. Blocking users
body: Blocking tools let you limit unwanted interactions. Blocking may prevent messages, contact or visibility depending on the available feature.

sections.heading: 3. Moderation and content review
body: We use human review, technical signals, reports, content controls and enforcement measures to remove content, pause features, end live streams, limit accounts or suspend access when appropriate.

sections.heading: 4. Fraud protection
body: We monitor payment patterns, gifts, chargebacks, automation, impersonation, spam, scams and earning manipulation. We may hold transactions, pause payouts or request additional information.

sections.heading: 5. Minor protection
body: MeetYouLive prohibits exploitation, sexualization, grooming, harassment or risk involving minors. We may act immediately, preserve evidence and escalate reports to providers or authorities.

sections.heading: 6. Account verification
body: We may request email, phone, age, identity, creator eligibility or payment information verification to protect users, creators, providers and platform integrity.

communityGuidelines.title: Community Guidelines
communityGuidelines.description: Behavior expectations for users, viewers, matches and creators.

sections.heading: 1. Respect and consent
body: Respect every person. Consent must be clear, ongoing and revocable in chat, calls, video calls, live streams, gifts and any interaction.

MeetYouLive is operated by MEETYOULIVE TECHNOLOGIES LLC. The official MeetYouLive site is https://meetyoulive.net, and references to "we," "us" or "our" mean that legal entity as operator of the MeetYouLive platform.

sections.heading: 2. Dating and match safety
body: Do not share sensitive information too soon, pressure others for meetings, external payments or intimate content, and report suspicious behavior. MeetYouLive does not verify every user claim.

sections.heading: 3. Prohibited conduct and content
body: We prohibit harassment, spam, scams, impersonation, illegal content, violence, illegal pornography, sale of drugs, weapons, financial fraud, exploitation, hate, threats and any activity that puts users or third parties at risk.

sections.heading: 3. Live streams and rooms
body: Creators and participants must keep conversations safe, avoid hate, humiliation, exploitation, illegal activity or unauthorized content. Hosts must cooperate with moderation.

sections.heading: 4. Gifts and support
body: Gifts are voluntary. Do not promise romantic, sexual, financial or off-platform contact outcomes in exchange for coins or gifts.

sections.heading: 5. Reports
body: Use reporting tools for abuse, harassment, fraud, minors at risk, rights infringement or prohibited content. False or abusive reports may also be sanctioned.

sections.heading: 6. Consequences
body: We may warn, limit, remove content, suspend features or close accounts. In serious cases we may act without prior notice.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: How we collect, use and protect data across profiles, matches, chat, calls, live streams, payments, reports and moderation.

sections.heading: 1. Controller and contact
body: MeetYouLive processes personal data to operate the platform. Privacy requests can be submitted through the in-platform contact or support flows.

MeetYouLive is operated by MEETYOULIVE TECHNOLOGIES LLC. The official MeetYouLive site is https://meetyoulive.net, and references to "we," "us" or "our" mean that legal entity as operator of the MeetYouLive platform.

sections.heading: 2. Data we collect
body: We may collect account, profile, age, approximate location, photos, preferences, language, matches, likes, chats, calls, video calls, live streams, gifts, coins, transactions, creator requests, reports and technical signals.
We do not store full card numbers when Stripe processes a payment. Stripe, Stripe Connect or other providers may process financial data under their own policies.

sections.heading: 3. How we use data
body: We use data to create accounts, personalize discovery and matches, enable chat, calls and live streams, process payments, manage coins and gifts, support creators, prevent fraud, moderate content, respond to reports and comply with legal obligations.

sections.heading: 4. Communications, image and voice
body: Live streams, calls and video calls may transmit image, voice, messages, gifts and technical metadata. You must not record or redistribute others' content without authorization when prohibited by law or our policies.
We may review reported content or related signals for safety, abuse prevention and compliance.

sections.heading: 5. Minors and safety
body: We apply measures to reduce risks to minors, including restrictions, reports, review and suspension. If you detect content or conduct that puts a minor at risk, report it immediately.

sections.heading: 6. Sharing and providers
body: We may share data with infrastructure, payment, streaming, notification, operational analytics, support, moderation, legal compliance and fraud-prevention providers. We do not sell personal data.

sections.heading: 7. Retention, rights and deletion
body: We retain data as long as needed to provide the service, comply with legal obligations, manage disputes, prevent abuse and protect safety. You may request access, correction, deletion, portability or objection through the in-platform contact or support flows.

sections.heading: 8. Security and changes
body: We use reasonable technical and organizational security measures, but no system is completely secure. We may update this policy and will notify material changes when appropriate.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Terms for matches, chat, calls, video calls, live streams, gifts, coins, creators and moderation.

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance and scope
body: By accessing or using MeetYouLive you accept these Terms of Service and the linked policies. If you do not agree, you must not use the platform.

MeetYouLive is operated by MEETYOULIVE TECHNOLOGIES LLC. The official MeetYouLive site is https://meetyoulive.net, and references to "we," "us" or "our" mean that legal entity as operator of the MeetYouLive platform.
These terms apply to the website, apps, accounts, profiles, matches, chat, calls, video calls, live streams, gifts, coins, subscriptions, creator content and moderation tools.

sections.heading: 2. Eligibility and minors
body: MeetYouLive is intended for users who meet the applicable minimum legal age in their jurisdiction and never for minors where the law or monetization features prohibit access. We may request age or identity verification to protect users, creators and third parties.

Publishing, requesting, transmitting or facilitating exploitation, sexualization, harassment, grooming or any risk to minors is prohibited. We may block accounts, preserve evidence and report to competent authorities.

sections.heading: 3. Social and communication features
body: You may use MeetYouLive to discover profiles, match, chat, make calls, make video calls, enter rooms, watch live streams and participate in live experiences. You must respect consent, privacy and other users' boundaries.

We do not guarantee matches, creator availability, earnings, audience, continuous connectivity or technical compatibility. Interactions may be moderated, limited or suspended if we detect abuse, fraud or safety risk.

sections.heading: 4. Coins, gifts, payments and creators
body: Coins and virtual gifts are digital items for use inside MeetYouLive and do not represent money, deposits, stored value or property rights outside the platform.
Payments may be processed through Stripe, Stripe Connect or other authorized providers. Approved creators may monetize under the Creator Policy, Payments & Refund Policy and platform rules.

sections.heading: 5. Content and intellectual property
body: You keep rights to content you publish, but you grant MeetYouLive the worldwide, non-exclusive license needed to host, display, moderate and distribute it within the service and to operate features such as live streams, rooms, gifts and profiles.
You may not publish content that infringes copyright, trademarks, likeness, privacy or third-party rights. Claims are handled under the DMCA / Copyright Policy.

sections.heading: 6. Acceptable use and moderation
body: You must follow the Acceptable Use Policy, Community Guidelines and Safety & Moderation Policy. We may remove content, limit visibility, end live streams, block chats, suspend payments, suspend accounts or terminate access when necessary.
Decisions may be based on reports, human review, technical signals, fraud patterns or legal and Stripe requirements.

sections.heading: 7. Suspension, termination and appeals
body: We may suspend or close accounts for violations, user risk, payment fraud, abusive chargebacks, sanction evasion, intellectual property infringement or failure to meet creator requirements.
When reasonable, you may request review or appeal through support. Some immediate measures may remain in place to protect users, minors, rights holders or payment integrity.

sections.heading: 8. Limitation of liability
body: MeetYouLive is provided as available. We are not responsible for indirect losses, lost profits, connectivity failures, user actions, third-party content or payment provider decisions, except where applicable law provides otherwise.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.description: How MeetYouLive uses cookies and similar technologies for session, security, preferences and service improvement.

sections.heading: 1. What cookies are
body: Cookies and similar technologies are small files or identifiers that help remember session, preferences, language, security, performance and basic site or app functionality.

sections.heading: 2. Necessary cookies
body: We use necessary cookies for login, security, fraud prevention, load balancing, abuse protection and essential functions. Without these cookies, some parts of MeetYouLive would not work properly.

sections.heading: 3. Preferences and experience
body: We may use local storage or cookies to remember language, interface preferences, consent, viewed notices and experience options inside the platform.

sections.heading: 4. Operational analytics
body: We may use aggregated or technical measurements to understand performance, errors and general service use. We do not sell personal data to third parties.

sections.heading: 5. Cookie management
body: You can manage cookies from your browser or device settings. Blocking necessary cookies may affect login, payments, security or interactive features.

paymentsRefunds.title: Refund Policy
paymentsRefunds.description: Refund rules for coins, Premium purchases, virtual gifts, eligible cases, non-refundable cases, request timing and contact procedure.

sections.heading: 1. Policy scope
body: This policy explains how MeetYouLive reviews refund requests for coins, Premium purchases, virtual gifts and other digital services offered by MEETYOULIVE TECHNOLOGIES LLC.
Purchases may be processed by Stripe, Stripe Connect or another authorized payment provider. Available prices, taxes, currencies and payment methods may vary by country and device.
Purchases of coins, Premium, VIP and virtual gifts are digital services. Refunds are evaluated only for duplicate charges, verifiable technical error, proven fraud or an applicable legal obligation.

sections.heading: 2. Coins purchases
body: Coins are a digital balance used inside MeetYouLive. Coins are not money, do not earn interest, cannot be transferred outside the platform and are generally non-refundable after they are credited or used.
If a coins purchase was charged but not credited, or if a duplicate charge occurred, contact support so we can review the transaction.

sections.heading: 3. Premium purchases and subscriptions
body: Premium features, subscriptions and passes are governed by the terms shown at checkout. Cancellation stops future renewal where applicable but does not automatically refund prior access already delivered.
A refund may be considered if Premium access was not activated because of a verifiable technical error or if a duplicate charge occurred.

sections.heading: 4. Virtual gifts and creator interactions
body: Virtual gifts, Sparks and similar digital items are delivered instantly to support creators or enhance live, chat and video experiences. Gifts already sent, delivered or consumed are normally final and non-refundable.
Creator payouts may be reviewed separately under platform rules, anti-fraud checks and payment provider requirements.

sections.heading: 5. Cases where a refund may apply
body: We may approve a refund for duplicate charges, an accidental duplicate purchase, a verifiable technical error, a purchase not credited to the account, unauthorized use reported promptly, or any case where applicable law requires a refund.
We may request account email, username, payment date, amount, transaction identifier and a description of the issue before making a decision.

sections.heading: 6. Cases where a refund does not apply
body: Refunds generally do not apply to coins already spent, virtual gifts already sent, Premium access already used, dissatisfaction after receiving the purchased service, violations of platform rules, fraudulent activity, or chargebacks opened without first contacting support.
We may suspend access to coins, gifts, accounts or payouts while a payment dispute, fraud review or chargeback is pending.

sections.heading: 7. Request window
body: Refund requests should be submitted within 14 days of the charge or as soon as possible after discovering the issue. Requests submitted after that period may be denied unless required by law or supported by exceptional circumstances.

sections.heading: 8. Contact procedure
body: To request a refund, email support@meetyoulive.net or use the available support/contact flow. Include your account email, username, payment date, amount, transaction ID and the reason for the request.
Support is available Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM (ET). We review requests in good faith and may process approved refunds through the original payment method when possible.

contentPolicy.title: Content Policy
contentPolicy.description: Rules for profiles, photos, videos, chats, video calls, live streams, gifts, creators and user-generated content.

sections.heading: 1. Allowed content
body: You may share your own, legal, authorized and respectful content in profiles, photos, videos, chats, video calls, live streams and creator spaces.

sections.heading: 2. Prohibited content
body: Illegal content, extreme violence, exploitation or risk to minors, illegal pornography, non-consensual intimate content, doxxing, harassment, hate, scams, sale of drugs, weapons, financial fraud or intellectual property infringement are prohibited.

sections.heading: 3. Rights and permissions
body: You must have rights or permission for all content you publish. Do not use another person’s image, voice, trademarks, music, videos or materials without authorization where required.

sections.heading: 4. Review and moderation
body: We may review reported content, risk signals and creator content. Violations may lead to removal, visibility limits, live-stream suspension, feature blocking or account closure.

sections.heading: 5. Live experiences
body: In live streams, video calls and chats you must respect consent, boundaries and privacy. Do not record, redistribute or pressure others to share intimate content or personal data.

creatorPolicy.title: Creator Policy
creatorPolicy.description: Rules for approved creators, monetization, gifts, coins, agencies, payouts and Stripe Connect.

sections.heading: 1. Creator approval
body: Being a creator is a privilege subject to review, age, identity, quality, safety and compliance requirements. We may approve, reject, pause or remove creator status.

MeetYouLive is operated by MEETYOULIVE TECHNOLOGIES LLC. The official MeetYouLive site is https://meetyoulive.net, and references to "we," "us" or "our" mean that legal entity as operator of the MeetYouLive platform.

sections.heading: 2. Content and conduct
body: Creators are responsible for live streams, videos, rooms, profiles, promotions and fan communications. They must follow Community Guidelines, Acceptable Use, intellectual property and platform rules.

sections.heading: 3. Monetization, gifts and coins
body: Creator earnings may come from gifts, premium content, calls or other enabled features. Internal balances are not money until MeetYouLive validates requirements and processes an allowed payout.

sections.heading: 4. Commissions and withdrawals
body: Creators may earn from gifts, premium content, calls or other enabled features. Commissions, splits, eligible balances, withdrawal minimums, account review and payout timing apply under platform rules and Stripe Connect requirements.

sections.heading: 4. Stripe Connect, agencies and payouts
body: We may use Stripe Connect or other providers for identity verification, tax compliance and payouts. Agencies or sub-creator relationships are valid only when active and accepted by the parties in the platform.

sections.heading: 5. Fraud and manipulation
body: Inflating gifts, rankings or earnings with fake accounts, self-payments, coordinated chargebacks, misleading promises, bought traffic or any manipulation is prohibited.

sections.heading: 6. Monetization suspension
body: We may hold, adjust or cancel payouts for fraud, disputes, violations, legal requirements, provider sanctions, user risk or report investigations.

helpCenter.title: Help Center
helpCenter.description: Frequently asked questions about account, profile, coins, Premium, VIP, Creator, Live, chat, video calls, payments and safety.

sections.heading: Account
body: You can create an account using available methods, keep your data updated and contact support if you lose access or detect suspicious activity.

sections.heading: Profile
body: Complete your name, photos, preferences and public information authentically. Fake, misleading or rights-infringing profiles may be limited or suspended.

sections.heading: Coins
body: Coins are internal digital balance for features, virtual gifts and experiences inside MeetYouLive. They have no monetary value outside the platform.

sections.heading: Premium
body: Premium enables digital benefits described at purchase. Review price, renewal, included features and terms before confirming payment.

sections.heading: VIP
body: VIP may offer additional digital benefits, access or visibility depending on availability. Specific terms are shown in the purchase experience.

sections.heading: Creator
body: Creators must request approval, meet safety and content requirements, and maintain an eligible account for monetization, commissions and withdrawals.

sections.heading: Live
body: Live streams let users interact in real time, receive messages and virtual gifts. They must follow Community Guidelines and the Content Policy.

sections.heading: Chat
body: Chat lets you communicate with other users under platform rules. Report spam, harassment, scams, impersonation or suspicious requests.

sections.heading: Video calls
body: Video calls are real-time digital experiences. Respect consent, privacy and boundaries; report unsafe conduct.

sections.heading: Payments
body: Payments may be processed by Stripe or other providers. For issues, send account, date, amount, method and transaction identifier to support.

sections.heading: Safety
body: Use report and block when needed. We review fraud risk, prohibited content, minor protection and account verification.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Support email, contact form and estimated response time for users, payments, safety and compliance.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable Use Policy
acceptableUse.description: Minimum rules for using MeetYouLive safely, legally and respectfully.

sections.heading: 1. Principles
body: Use MeetYouLive to connect, talk, create and support content legally, safely and with consent. Do not use the platform to harm, deceive, harass, exploit or infringe rights.

MeetYouLive is operated by MEETYOULIVE TECHNOLOGIES LLC. The official MeetYouLive site is https://meetyoulive.net, and references to "we," "us" or "our" mean that legal entity as operator of the MeetYouLive platform.

sections.heading: 2. Prohibited conduct
body: Harassment, threats, hate, spam, fraud, impersonation, payment manipulation, ban evasion, scraping, abusive automation, malware, social engineering or attempts to access others' accounts or systems are prohibited.

sections.heading: 3. Prohibited content
body: Do not publish illegal content, sexual exploitation, content that puts minors at risk, extreme violence, instructions for real-world harm, doxxing, non-consensual nudity, extortion, terrorism, trafficking, illegal drugs or intellectual property infringement.

sections.heading: 4. Chat, calls and live streams
body: In messages, calls, video calls and live streams you must respect consent, boundaries and privacy. Do not pressure others to share data, images, external payments, intimate content or off-platform communications.

sections.heading: 5. Payments, coins and gifts
body: Do not use coins, gifts, subscriptions, refunds, chargebacks or Stripe Connect for fraud, laundering, misleading monetization, artificial self-gifting or ranking manipulation.

sections.heading: 6. Enforcement
body: Violations may result in content removal, loss of feature access, live stream blocking, payout suspension, account suspension or reports to authorities and providers.

dmca.title: DMCA / Copyright Policy
dmca.description: Process for reporting copyright, trademark, likeness and intellectual property infringement.

sections.heading: 1. Respect for intellectual property
body: MeetYouLive respects copyright, trademarks, likeness and other intellectual property rights. Users and creators should only publish content they own or are authorized to use.

MeetYouLive is operated by MEETYOULIVE TECHNOLOGIES LLC. The official MeetYouLive site is https://meetyoulive.net, and references to "we," "us" or "our" mean that legal entity as operator of the MeetYouLive platform.

sections.heading: 2. Infringement notice
body: Submit copyright claims through the in-platform contact or support flows and include identification of the work, infringing content, URL or user, contact details, good-faith statement, accuracy statement and physical or electronic signature.

sections.heading: 3. Takedown and measures
body: We may remove or limit allegedly infringing content, suspend live streams, restrict repeat-infringer accounts and preserve information needed to manage disputes.

sections.heading: 4. Counter-notice
body: If you believe your content was removed by mistake, you may send a counter-notice with your details, content identification, statement under responsibility and jurisdiction consent where applicable.

sections.heading: 5. Repeat infringement and abuse
body: Repeated infringements may cause account closure. False, abusive or bad-faith claims may have legal consequences and platform sanctions.

safetyModeration.title: Safety & Moderation Policy
safetyModeration.description: Reports, review, moderation actions, suspensions, appeals and user protection.

sections.heading: 1. Goal
body: We want MeetYouLive to be safe for discovering people, matching, chatting, calling, streaming, creating and sending gifts. This policy explains how we handle risks and reports.

MeetYouLive is operated by MEETYOULIVE TECHNOLOGIES LLC. The official MeetYouLive site is https://meetyoulive.net, and references to "we," "us" or "our" mean that legal entity as operator of the MeetYouLive platform.

sections.heading: 2. Reports and signals
body: We may receive user reports, technical signals, fraud patterns, provider alerts and internal reviews. Reports may involve profiles, chats, calls, live streams, gifts, payments or content.

sections.heading: 3. Reporting, blocking and verification
body: Users can report or block accounts using available tools. We may request account, age, identity or additional verification to protect against fraud, impersonation and security risks.

sections.heading: 3. Review and actions
body: Depending on severity, we may warn, remove content, limit reach, block messages, close live streams, restrict gifts, pause payouts, temporarily suspend or close accounts.

sections.heading: 4. Minors and severe harm
body: We prioritize reports involving minors, exploitation, threats, violence, self-harm, extortion, non-consensual intimate content and fraud. We may escalate to providers, authorities or emergency lines when necessary.

sections.heading: 5. Appeals
body: When a decision can be appealed, you may request review through the in-platform contact, support or report flows. Include username, account email, affected decision and context. Some measures will remain in place during review to protect the community.

sections.heading: 6. Transparency
body: We may update rules, automations and review criteria to meet legal requirements, Stripe requirements and privacy and moderation best practices.
